hooks.command: printf '[cuc/wenyan-ultra] Active. Internal comms: 文言ultra. Artifact gate: normalize English before Write/Edit/git/GitHub calls.\n'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.vaked) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; echo "[vaked check] $f"; python3 -m vakedc check "$f" 2>&1 | grep -viE 'Unicode data version' | tail -8 ;; esac; exit 0
